metadata.discovered_via: rulespec-us issue 541 Title II benefit-formula grounding gap
metadata.source_authority: Social Security Administration, Office of the Chief Actuary
metadata.source_note: Official SSA OACT cost-of-living adjustment determination page. Carries the 2.8 percent COLA effective for December 2025 (payable 2026) and the CPI-W third-quarter computation (317.265 vs 308.729). Sibling of the existing us/guidance/ssa automatic-determination blocks (contribution-and-benefit-base, quarter-of-coverage, retirement-earnings-test, pia-bend-points, substantial-gainful-activity).
metadata.title: SSA Office of the Chief Actuary: Latest Cost-of-Living Adjustment (2.8 percent COLA effective December 2025)

metadata.discovered_via: rulespec-us issue 541 Title II benefit-formula grounding gap
metadata.source_authority: Social Security Administration via U.S. Government Publishing Office
metadata.source_note: Formal SSA determination notice under 42 U.S.C. 415(i) and related provisions. Announces the 2.8 percent cost-of-living increase effective December 2025 and the 2026 PIA formula bend points of $1,286 and $7,749, among other 2026 automatic determinations.
metadata.title: Cost-of-Living Increase and Other Determinations for 2026 (90 FR 49047)
